Metadata.title: PT Sanggar Seni Annisa Rumpaka — Sundanese Cultural Heritage Since 2003
Metadata.description: Traditional Sundanese dance studio in Bandung. Offering stage performances, traditional costume rentals (Arum Costume), art school for children & youth (Arum Art School), and international festival collaborations.

title: LITTLE
ASIA
slides.desc: Competing and collaborating with other Asian countries at the Little Asia festival in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia (2023-2024), featuring five stunning traditional dances from across the Indonesian archipelago.

title: OSAKA
EXPO
slides.desc: As an official delegate representing Bogor Regency at the 2025 World Expo Osaka, Japan, presenting the interactive Kaulinan Barudak (Sundanese Children's Traditional Games) dance on the global stage.

title: BOULEVARD
WORLD
slides.desc: Showcasing the beauty of Balinese Janger, Sundanese Jaipong, and the elegant Peacock (Merak) dances at the Boulevard World stage in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia (2025-2026).

title: STUDIO
PROFILE
slides.desc: A performing arts institution focused on the preservation, development, and internationalization of Indonesian culture through innovative dance works.

Home.about_desc: Annisa Rumpaka Art Studio is a performing arts institution focused on the preservation, development, and internationalization of Indonesian culture through innovative dance works. Established in 2008 and based in Bogor, we have grown into a creative platform connecting traditional values with contemporary artistic approaches.

About.hero_desc: A closer look at our journey, vision, and dedication to preserving Indonesian culture on the global stage.
About.profil_p1: Annisa Rumpaka Art Academy is a performing arts institution focused on the preservation, development, and internationalization of Indonesian culture through innovative dance works.
About.profil_p2: Founded in 2008 and based in Bogor, Indonesia, this studio has evolved into a creative platform that connects traditional values with contemporary artistic approaches. Supported by professional trainers and experienced artists, Annisa Rumpaka consistently presents works that are not only aesthetic but also carry educational and cultural diplomacy values.
About.profil_p3: Along with the increasing trust from various institutions and the community, Annisa Rumpaka Art Academy actively participates in various national and international stages as a cultural representation of Indonesia.
About.visi_desc: To be a leading performing arts institution that showcases the cultural richness of Indonesia on the global stage. By prioritizing innovation, authenticity, and international quality standards, we are committed to preserving and promoting traditional Indonesian arts while creating competitive, relevant, and high-value works globally.
misi_list: Developing traditional Indonesian dance arts through creative and contemporary approaches without losing original cultural values.
Becoming a cultural ambassador for Indonesia in various international forums and events as a form of cultural diplomacy.
Creating performing arts works capable of reaching global audiences through strong storytelling and aesthetic visuals.
Enhancing the quality of human resources in the arts through professional and continuous training.
Building collaborations across countries and cultures to expand the exposure of Indonesian arts worldwide.
About.jasa_desc: We provide various performing arts services that can be tailored to national or international event needs, including:

Services.hero_desc: From stage performances to arts education — we are here to preserve and celebrate the beauty of Sundanese culture.

items.title:
Stage
Performance
items.desc: Traditional and contemporary dance performances for cultural events, official openings, and cross-cultural collaborations. We feature trained dancers with professional stage management on national and international scales.

items.title:
Traditional
Attire
items.desc: Premium collection of traditional dance costumes with handmade details crafted by experienced artisans. Available for rent or purchase for professional stage needs, cultural festivals, and documentation.

items.title:
Dance Art
School
items.desc: Dance learning programs for children and youth with creative methods that blend Sundanese traditional values with contemporary artistic expression. Guided by senior dancers with over two decades of experience.

items.title:
Festival &
Stage
items.desc: Our track record of bringing cultural arts to various prestigious stages — from national festivals to international cultural stages (Little Asia, Osaka Expo, Boulevard World Riyadh).

Services.cta_desc: Tell us your needs and our team will contact you within 24 hours.

ArtSchool.hero_desc: Learn Sundanese dance from instructors with over 20 years of experience. Complete programs for children, youth, and adults — from beginner to advanced.
ArtSchool.prog_desc: Three learning paths designed to adapt to each student's pace and goals — from basic introduction to professional competition preparation.

items.title: Regular
items.desc: Weekly classes in small groups. Perfect for those who want to learn at a relaxed pace while exploring culture.

items.title: Intensive
items.desc: Acceleration program for those who already have basics or want to master quickly. High frequency with in-depth material.

items.title: Private
items.desc: One-on-one training with a custom curriculum. Ideal for preparation for auditions, competitions, or special performances.

ArtSchool.curr_desc: Our curriculum is divided into four progressive stages. Each student undergoes an assessment before moving to the next stage — ensuring a solid foundation before advancing.
ArtSchool.curr_quote: "Dance is not just movement — it's a way for the body to understand history."

stages.name: Introduction
stages.desc: Introduction to basic posture, drum rhythms, and key hand movements. Focused on confidence and love for Sundanese arts.

stages.name: Foundations
stages.desc: Mastery of short dances like Kembang Tanjung. Training in hand-foot coordination, facial expressions, and musicality.

stages.name: Intermediate
stages.desc: Full-duration dances like Jaipong and Ronggeng. Understanding cultural theory, history, and dance character.

stages.name: Advanced
stages.desc: Complex classical dances like Tari Merak (Peacock Dance) and Mask Dance. Professional stage preparation, competition, and independent choreography.

ArtSchool.inst_desc: Certified teachers with national and international stage experience. Each instructor focuses on their respective areas of expertise.

instructors.name: Annisa R.
instructors.bio: Maestro of Sundanese classical dance with 25+ years of experience. ISBI Bandung graduate.

instructors.name: Dewi M.
instructors.bio: Specialist in children's pedagogy. 15 years of experience teaching in primary & secondary schools.

instructors.name: Rinda S.
instructors.bio: Active choreographer blending traditional Sundanese dance with contemporary elements.

instructors.name: Bagas P.
instructors.bio: Traditional mask dance specialist. Has performed at Southeast Asian festivals.

ArtSchool.faq_desc: Frequently asked questions by prospective students and parents.

faqs.a: No. Our Regular program is designed for total beginners. We start from posture, breathing, and basic movements — anyone can join.

faqs.q: What is the minimum age to register?
faqs.a: Children's classes start from age 5 (Introduction class). For adults, there is no upper age limit — we have students up to age 60+.
Yes. Students get special rental access from Arum Costume at student rates for end-of-program and annual performances.

faqs.q: How does the stage progression system work?
faqs.a: Each stage has a final exam in the form of a dance demonstration. Assessment includes technique, expression, musicality, and consistency. Passing students receive a certificate and can register for the next stage.

faqs.q: Is there a trial class before registering?
faqs.a: Yes. We provide one free trial session for prospective new students. Contact us via WhatsApp to schedule.
The main studio is in Bandung, West Java. Private classes can be held at the student's location (within Bandung city) with additional transportation costs.

ArtSchool.cta_desc: Register for a free trial session to experience our class firsthand — no cost, no commitment.

Contact.hero_desc: We would love to hear from you — whether for performance consultations, Art School programs, or other collaborations.
Contact.form_sub: Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you within 24 hours on business days.
